caption: The video captures a significant event celebrating the foundation day of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The scene is divided into two main frames: on the left, a prominent figure, likely a key leader or dignitary, is seen addressing the audience. This individual is dressed in traditional attire, including an orange turban and a shawl with the colors of the Indian flag, symbolizing patriotism and party affiliation. The background is adorned with multiple BJP logos, reinforcing the party's identity. On the right, a large gathering of attendees, also wearing similar attire, is seated and attentively listening to the speech. The audience appears engaged, with some clapping, indicating their support and enthusiasm. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal and celebratory occasion, emphasizing unity and the party's values. The video is being broadcast live, as indicated by the "Live Dekhen" text and social media handles at the bottom, ensuring that viewers can follow the event in real-time.
